facebook.caption: Phu Quoc that doesn't feel touristy. Phu Quoc Bee Farm slows everything down. Fresh honey straight from the hive, bees landing on your hands, zero crowds. This is the half-day reset you didn't know you needed. 4.8 stars across 763 reviews. The rating makes sense the second you arrive. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
